title: Smoked Mackerel Ceviche with Rocoto
description: A refreshing Peruvian-inspired dish that combines the rich flavors of smoked mackerel with the spicy kick of rocoto peppers, all within the keto diet.
instructions: In a medium bowl, combine smoked mackerel, rocoto peppers, Peruvian lime juice, and salt. Mix well to combine.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, stir in chopped onions and cilantro.
Serve the ceviche chilled, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
